'''Sula Autem''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the wife of [[Sagoro Autem|Sagoro]] and the mother of [[Reymet Autem|Reymet]] and [[Lissa Autem|Lissa]].

==Biography==
Both Sula and her husband were descended from generations of [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guards]], and lived with their children in an apartment on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. When Sagoro went to work as a Guard for the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], she spent much of her time at home with their children.

After the events of Sagoro's case with [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]], and her husband's aggression towards their son as a result of his lack of interest in Sagoro's work, Sula separated from Sagoro and moved with their children to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

Sula eventually reunited with him several weeks after the Republic was reformed into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] under the rule of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].
